subject: Fermi  trigger No 646443989: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB210626.99 (trigger No 646443989,23h 36m 31.20s , +09d 36m 00.0s, R=1.48) errorbox  9433 sec after notice time and 82250 sec after trigger time at 2021-06-27 22:37:15 UT, with upper limit up to  16.7 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 60 deg. The sun  altitude  is -21.0 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -49 deg., longitude l = 95 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1646536

We obtain a following upper limits.
